## Risk Class

- [ ] Documentation or presentation only
- [ ] Normal feature or bug fix
- [ ] Architecture-sensitive
- [ ] Security or trust-boundary-sensitive
- [ ] Data, financial, or integration-sensitive
- [ ] Production, release, packaging, or installer change

- Artifact synchronization:
- MCP smoke test:

## Release Readiness

- [ ] Project instructions and policy were read
- [ ] Changed files and generated mirrors were reviewed
- [ ] Secret scan is clean or every finding is resolved
- [ ] Documentation and migration impact are covered
- [ ] Rollback is documented for production-facing changes
- [ ] Monitoring or canary evidence is documented where applicable
- [ ] This PR does not treat JStack completion as release authority

## Residual Risk

List known limitations, skipped checks, assumptions, and follow-up work.
